accommodation.address: Lot A1 Zone of the Villas of, Green Island, Hoa Cuong Ward, 84511 Danang, Vietnam
accommodation.name: Grand Mercure Danang

location.address: Tan Son Nhat Airport (SGN) Terminal 3

activities.remarks: Departs 4:45 PM, Arrives Da Nang 6:05 PM. Terminal 1.

location.address: Dragon Bridge, An Hai Tay, Son Tra, Da Nang 550000

activities.remarks: 666m-long dragon-shaped bridge over Han River. Fire & water breathing show every Sat/Sun at 9 PM. Family favorite! Walk along Bach Dang Street nearby.

location.address: No. 02, 2 Thang 9 Street, Binh Hien, Hai Chau, Da Nang

activities.remarks: World's largest collection of Cham artefacts dating from 7th-15th centuries. Air-conditioned, great for hot afternoons. Kids love the ancient statues.

location.address: 119 Tran Phu, Hai Chau 1, Hai Chau, Da Nang 550000

activities.remarks: Iconic local market for Vietnamese snacks, dried fruits, ao dai tailoring, and souvenirs. Try the fresh spring rolls and avocado ice cream.

location.address: Vo Nguyen Giap, Phuoc My, Son Tra, Da Nang

activities.remarks: Forbes' one of the most attractive beaches in the world. Soft white sand, gentle waves, family-friendly. Best in early morning or late afternoon to avoid midday heat.

location.address: Son Tra Peninsula, Tho Quang, Son Tra, Da Nang

activities.remarks: 67m-tall Lady Buddha statue overlooking the sea. Panoramic views of Da Nang coastline. Drive up Son Tra Peninsula, spot rare red-shanked douc langurs.

accommodation.address: An Son, Hoa Son Commune, Hoa Vang District, 0 DANANG, Vietnam
accommodation.name: Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

activities.activity_name: Private transfer: Grand Mercure → Bana Hills

location.address: Da Nang → Bana Hills

activities.remarks: Kevin requested private ride from Grand Mercure to Bana Hills via cable car. Awaiting confirmation from hotel (Truong).

location.address: Bana Hills, Da Nang

activities.remarks: Cable car rides, Golden Bridge, French Village, amusement park. Cable car tickets NOT included in hotel price.

location.address: Sun World Ba Na Hills, Hoa Ninh, Hoa Vang, Da Nang

activities.remarks: Iconic 150m pedestrian bridge held by giant stone hands. Walk among clouds at 1,414m altitude. Best photos before 9 AM to avoid crowds.

location.address: Sun World Ba Na Hills, Hoa Ninh, Hoa Vang, Da Nang

activities.remarks: 3-level indoor amusement park perfect for kids. 4D/5D cinema, Jurassic Park zone, bumper cars, climbing wall, and soft play areas. Free entry with Ba Na Hills ticket.

location.address: Sun World Ba Na Hills, Hoa Ninh, Hoa Vang, Da Nang

activities.remarks: European-themed cobblestone streets at mountain top. Gothic cathedral, fountains, and town square. Beautiful at sunset when the mist rolls in and lights come on.

location.address: Sun World Ba Na Hills, Hoa Ninh, Hoa Vang, Da Nang

activities.remarks: Thrilling mountain luge ride with individual speed control. Safe for kids who can sit with parents. Queue can be long - go early morning.

accommodation.address: 170 Vo Nguyen Giap, Da Nang, Vietnam, 550000
accommodation.name: Radisson Hotel Danang

location.address: My Khe Beach, Da Nang

activities.remarks: Walking distance from Radisson. One of Vietnam's most famous beaches.

location.address: Dragon Bridge, Da Nang

activities.remarks: Dragon breathes fire/water on weekend evenings. Check schedule.

location.address: 81 Huyen Tran Cong Chua, Hoa Hai, Ngu Hanh Son, Da Nang 550000

activities.remarks: Five limestone hills with caves, pagodas, and panoramic views. Thuy Son is the main mountain with the most to see. Climb to the top for stunning coastal views. Wear comfortable shoes - lots of steps. Optional elevator (15,000 VND).

activities.activity_name: Hoi An Ancient Town Walking Tour

location.address: Tran Phu Street, Hoi An Ancient Town, Quang Nam

activities.remarks: UNESCO World Heritage Site. Walk through 15th-19th century merchant houses, temples, and assembly halls. Must-see: Japanese Covered Bridge, Tan Ky Old House, Fujian Assembly Hall. Buy a Hoi An Old Town ticket (120,000 VND) covering 5 heritage sites. Morning is best to avoid heat.

location.address: 19 Tran Phu, Cam Chau, Hoi An, Quang Nam

activities.remarks: Bustling riverside market with fresh produce, spices, and street food. Try Cao Lau (Hoi An signature noodles) and White Rose dumplings. Great for buying Vietnamese coffee beans and lanterns.

location.address: Hoi An Ancient Town, Cam Pho, Hoi An, Quang Nam

activities.remarks: Family-friendly hands-on workshop making traditional Hoi An silk lanterns. Choose your fabric and frame, take home your creation. Many shops along Tran Phu and Nguyen Thai Hoc offer walk-in sessions (~150,000 VND per person).

activities.activity_name: Thu Bon River Sunset Boat Ride & Lantern Release

location.address: Bach Dang Street Pier, Hoi An Ancient Town, Quang Nam

activities.remarks: End the day with a sampan boat ride on Thu Bon River at sunset. Release floating lanterns on the water - a magical Hoi An tradition. Best from 5:30 PM as the old town lights up with colorful lanterns. Boat rides ~150,000 VND, lanterns ~10,000 VND each.

accommodation.address: Nguyễn Tất Thành, Hoà Hiệp Nam, Liên Chiểu, Da Nang
accommodation.name: Da Nang Mikazuki Japanese Resorts & Spa

location.address: Mikazuki Japanese Resorts & Spa

activities.remarks: Japanese-style onsen and spa experience. Relax before departure.

accommodation.name: Tan Son Nhat Airport Terminal 2
accommodation.address: Tan Son Nhat International Airport, Terminal 2, Ho Chi Minh City

location.address: Da Nang Airport (DAD) Terminal 1

activities.remarks: Departs 1:30 PM, Arrives SGN 3:05 PM. 1h 55m layover.

tripData.trip_name: Da Nang, Vietnam — May 30 to Jun 7, 2026
